# One-Page Policy Platform
## People Before Cartels

### 1) Constitutional War Powers
- No blank-check wars.
- Congress must vote before sustained hostilities.
- Clear mission, clear objective, clear sunset for any authorization.

### 2) Ban Congressional Insider Trading
- No individual stock trading by members of Congress, spouses, or dependent children.
- Mandatory divestment timeline and meaningful penalties.
- Real-time transparency and enforceable compliance.

### 3) Break Healthcare Middlemen Extraction
- Full pricing transparency from PBMs, insurers, and major hospital systems.
- Pass-through rebates to lower patient and employer costs.
- Expand competition for generics and independent pharmacy access.

### 4) Lower Housing Costs Through Supply
- Reduce federal barriers that inflate local building costs.
- Support practical zoning flexibility and faster approvals where local leaders choose reform.
- Protect affordable manufactured and starter housing pathways.

### 5) Border Security With Liberty
- Secure the border with serious enforcement and visa overstay accountability.
- No national biometric permission-to-work system for citizens.
- Target criminal networks while protecting constitutional rights.

### 6) Anti-Cartel Competition Agenda
- Challenge concentrated power in sectors that raise household costs.
- Enforce fair competition in agriculture, healthcare, and digital markets.
- End government favoritism that picks winners and locks out small competitors.

### 7) Family Cost Relief
- Focus federal policy on monthly household pressure: housing, healthcare, energy, and food.
- Prefer reforms that lower recurring bills over headline-only programs.
- Publish plain-language cost impact estimates for major proposals.

### 8) Fiscal Honesty and Accountability
- End last-minute omnibus habits and restore transparent budgeting.
- Require clearer deficit and debt disclosure for major legislation.
- Align spending with constitutional priorities and measurable outcomes.
